name: ap-invoice-review
description: Self-serve MCPB for deterministic AP invoice exception review.
long_description: Review AP invoice folders by detecting invoice, purchase order, and goods receipt PDFs from a visible local folder. Includes bundled demo PDFs exported to Documents/APInvoiceDemo. Never uses Airtable, Google Drive, or external ERP/SaaS writes.

tools.name: ap_invoice_setup_demo_workspace
tools.description: Export bundled demo PDFs to a visible local Documents/APInvoiceDemo folder.

tools.name: ap_invoice_list_demo_cases
tools.description: List visible local AP invoice demo cases, folders, PDFs, and expected outcomes.

tools.name: ap_invoice_preview_folder
tools.description: Preview a local folder and classify invoice, purchase order, and goods receipt PDFs before review.

tools.name: ap_invoice_review_folder
tools.description: Review a visible local AP invoice folder end-to-end without external writes.

tools.name: ap_invoice_review_demo_case
tools.description: Review a bundled demo case from the visible APInvoiceDemo workspace.

tools.name: ap_invoice_explain_exception
tools.description: Explain AP invoice review exceptions with evidence, rule IDs, and next actions.

tools.name: ap_invoice_build_approval_brief
tools.description: Build a concise AP invoice approval or hold brief for an approver.

tools.name: list_ap_demo_cases
tools.description: Compatibility: list bundled AP invoice demo cases and explain their business value.

tools.name: review_ap_demo_case
tools.description: Compatibility: run a bundled AP invoice demo case end-to-end and return a business decision packet.

tools.name: review_ap_invoice_packet
tools.description: Compatibility: review an invoice, purchase order, and goods receipt packet end-to-end.

tools.name: explain_ap_exception
tools.description: Compatibility: explain AP invoice review exceptions with evidence, rule IDs, and next actions.

tools.name: build_ap_approval_brief
tools.description: Compatibility: build a concise approval or hold brief for an AP approver.

tools.name: create_ap_review_case
tools.description: Advanced: create an AP invoice review case and return required upload slots.

tools.name: upload_ap_document
tools.description: Advanced: attach a bundled demo invoice, purchase order, or goods receipt PDF to a case.

tools.name: start_ap_invoice_review
tools.description: Advanced: run deterministic AP 3-way match, duplicate, vendor, and tax checks.

tools.name: get_ap_invoice_review_result
tools.description: Advanced: return a completed AP review decision packet with evidence and artifacts.

tools.name: build_erp_draft_payload
tools.description: Advanced: build a draft-only ERP/SaaS payload. External writes are never performed.
